questions.text: I like to lie on my side.

categories.name: Prophecy
categories.description: The ability to receive and communicate an immediate message of God to His people.

categories.name: Pastor
categories.description: The ability to assume long-term personal responsibility for the spiritual welfare of a group of believers.

categories.name: Teaching
categories.description: The ability to communicate biblical truth so that others learn and grow.

categories.name: Wisdom
categories.description: The ability to apply spiritual truth wisely to specific needs or situations.

categories.name: Knowledge
categories.description: The ability to discover, analyze, and clarify truth that helps the body of Christ.

categories.name: Exhortation
categories.description: The ability to encourage, comfort, counsel, and strengthen others.

categories.name: Discernment
categories.description: The ability to recognize whether something is from God, human origin, or evil.

categories.name: Giving
categories.description: The ability to contribute material resources to God’s work with generosity and joy.

categories.name: Helps
categories.description: The ability to support others so their ministry becomes more effective.

categories.name: Mercy
categories.description: The ability to feel compassion for those in distress and respond with loving action.

categories.name: Missionary
categories.description: The ability to minister effectively in another culture.

categories.name: Evangelist
categories.description: The ability to share the gospel with unbelievers in a way that leads people toward discipleship.

categories.name: Hospitality
categories.description: The ability to provide a warm welcome, food, lodging, or care to those in need.

categories.name: Faith
categories.description: The ability to trust God with unusual confidence for His purposes and work.

categories.name: Leadership
categories.description: The ability to set direction and help others work together toward God-honoring goals.

categories.name: Administration
categories.description: The ability to understand goals and organize plans, people, and resources to accomplish them.

categories.name: Miracles
categories.description: The ability to be used by God in powerful acts that alter ordinary circumstances.

categories.name: Healing
categories.description: The ability to be used by God in restoring health apart from ordinary means.

categories.name: Tongues
categories.description: The ability to speak to God or communicate a message in a language not learned naturally.

categories.name: Interpretation of Tongues
categories.description: The ability to make known the meaning of a message spoken in tongues.

categories.name: Intercession
categories.description: The ability to pray regularly for extended periods and see specific answers to prayer.

categories.name: Service
categories.description: The ability to identify practical needs and use available resources to meet them.
